inputs.label: Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the object being pushed up

inputs.label: Incline Angle
inputs.businessContext: Angle of incline relative to horizontal

inputs.label: Coefficient of Friction
inputs.businessContext: Friction coefficient between object and surface

inputs.label: Push Distance
inputs.businessContext: Distance the object is pushed along the incline

inputs.label: Time to Push
inputs.businessContext: Time taken to push the object over the distance, used for power calculation

inputs.label: Gravitational Acceleration
inputs.businessContext: Gravitational acceleration constant, default Earth gravity
